name: Malefic Paradigm Dragon
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｓｉｎ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>シン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> パラダイム・ドラゴン
desc: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned (from your hand) by banishing 1 "Malefic" monster from your Extra Deck while "Malefic Paradigm Dragon" is not on the field. If "Malefic World" is not on the field, destroy this card. Once per turn: You can send 1 "Malefic" card from your Deck to the GY; return 1 of your banished Level 8 Synchro Monsters to the Extra Deck, then you can Special Summon that monster from the Extra Deck, also you can only attack with "Malefic" monsters for the rest of this turn.
mnst_eff: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned (from your hand) by banishing 1 "Malefic" monster from your Extra Deck while "Malefic Paradigm Dragon" is not on the field. If "Malefic World" is not on the field, destroy this card. eff_types: Summoning condition, Summoning condition, Continuous, Ignition
action: Sends from Deck to Graveyard for cost
Returns the player's banished cards to the Extra Deck
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Special Summons from your Extra Deck
banished: Banishes from Extra Deck for Summon
